name: Lightfire Defense
short_description: You are the last Lightfire Keeper. Use the power of the elements to protect your beacon from incoming waves of enemies. Explore mysterious worlds to find a way to prevail over the inevitable.
detailed_description:
Tower Defense meets 3D Platforming!

Turrets! Traps! Magic! A variety of possibilities helps you to prevent the dreadful invaders from reaching your Lightfire Beacon. Bring together the lost pieces to assemble a portal that leads to... let's call it - an opportunity to survive all 50 waves of increasingly difficult enemies!

Features

  • Leveling System! Unlock new spells! Increase your stats and pew pew damage!
  • Upgradable Lightfire Beacon which helps you defend!
  • Master the four elements 🔥🌊🪨🌬️
  • A variety of enemies which your spells might be more or less effective against. Choose wisely.
  • Single Player

Lightfire Defense is still in Early Access. We happily invite you to reach out to us on social media or via email to make your experience count and to help making the game more interesting and fun!
